description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of brick and concrete finishes, with large glass windows providing ample natural light. The front of the house includes a gated driveway with two parked cars and a set of steps leading to the main entrance. The property is surrounded by a low brick wall and landscaped with several palm trees, giving it a contemporary urban feel. The rooftop includes open terrace spaces with seating and pergolas, suggesting areas for outdoor relaxation. The rear of the house features additional patio space and more greenery, enhancing its residential appeal.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, brick and concrete finishes, and landscaped with palm trees. Features include a gated driveway, rooftop terraces, and open patio areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, two cars, main entrance steps, and palm trees lining the entry.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long brick wall, side patio, and multiple palm trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying rooftop terraces, open patio space, and additional greenery at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view with a clear look at the driveway, cars, and the side landscaping with palm trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, a single modern door, and a gated driveway flanked by palm trees and a low brick wall.
